name: nexus-hrm
description: Nexus HRM — Full-stack Role-Based HR Management System

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx ts-node prisma/seed.ts
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx prisma migrate reset --force && npx ts-node prisma/seed.ts
